metadata.title: Noise Decorrelation as a Hypothetical Mechanism for Phase-Specific Neurometabolic Outcomes in HIV Infection: A Computational Framework
metadata.description: Data and code for: Noise Decorrelation as a Hypothetical Mechanism for Phase-Specific Neurometabolic Outcomes in HIV Infection. Bayesian analysis of MRS data from ~220 patients across 4 studies proposing a computational framework for acute neuroprotection and chronic neurodegeneration.
